actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component fileID 1887208566 (guid b61f5fbd6df31704b851371ab42625b2) corresponds to script ToggleOnOff attached to 'Spot Light' (fileID 1887208562). Initial state m_IsActive=0 (inactive). Has_Rigidbody=False, so Grab/Transform are not applicable. No m_Calls listed; manual trigger is required. Calling Toggle() should activate the GameObject (SetActive(true)).
After the previous action, 'Spot Light' is active. Trigger Toggle() again to verify the off path: it should deactivate the GameObject (SetActive(false)).
